description: Craft is a note-taking and document workspace for creating, organizing, and sharing notes, tasks, and other content. It also offers AI-assisted and integration features for connecting selected Craft content to external tools.
summary: Craft exposes a generated per-connection HTTP API and an MCP server for selected documents/spaces; both are enabled from the app’s Imagine tab and require Craft-issued connection credentials/authorization.

surfaces.name: Craft API
surfaces.url: unique per API connection; generated by Craft from the Imagine tab
